The Meme Games Token

Opening Ceremony

Light your torch for the inaugural Meme Games, where crypto meme coin fanaticism meets the spirit of the 2024 Olympics! Pick your favorite meme competitor and watch them go for gold to multiply your holdings!

The Meme Games Athletes

DOGE

He’s the oldest athlete at The Meme Games, but never count him out! Our dear Doge qualified for the 169M dash with a world record time of 6.3s. Having four legs has its advantages!

CHOOSE YOUR

MEME

The internet's favorite amphibian leaps into The Meme Games with the agility of a world-class gymnast. No surprise he’s also fucking brilliant at swimming, long jump, waterpolo, and more!

He’s the oldest athlete at The Meme Games, but never count him out! Our dear Doge qualified for the 169M dash with a world record time of 6.3s. Having four legs has its advantages!

Brett, the embodiment of every crypto bro, brings his relentless energy and meme-making prowess to The Meme Games. With laser eyes set on the prize, Brett is here to HODL his way to victory.

The fast and furious Turbo zooms into The Meme Games with lightning speed. Known for breaking barriers and setting records, Turbo is the ultimate meme sprinter and long-distance champion.

Sporting his iconic hat, Dogwifhat is the fashion-forward competitor in The Meme Games. With a knack for staying ahead of trends, this stylish canine knows how to turn heads and win hearts.

France's Olympic swimming hero PEPE is nearly unbeatable with his natural-born webbing and insane hydrodynamics. He’s so good in the water the other memes have appealed his eligibility.

BUY NOW

How to Participate in The Meme Games

How To Buy

The Meme Games is open to all memes, nations, and major currencies. Connect your wallet to the secure widget and purchase $MGMES tokens with ETH, BNB, USDT, or bank card.
Enter as many times as you want! The more times you buy, the greater your chance of winning a 25% token bonus! Tokens can be claimed after the presale ends.

Play To Win

Step 1: Buy $MGMES tokens to enter your competitor.
Step 2: Select the meme athlete you want to compete.
Step 3: Watch and win! If your athlete wins its Meme Games event, you'll earn a 25% bonus on your token purchase! Play as many times as you want and increase your chances of winning!

In the Meme Games, the field athlete DOGE amazes with his hereditary stamina and strength, leaping from the starting blocks even faster than Solana on a good day.

BUY NOW

What is this?

The Meme Games Token Leaderboard! This tracks the number of event wins for each meme athlete. These statistics are pulled directly from the blockchain from the randomized results after each presale purchase.

The Meme Games Token FAQs

01 What is The Meme Games?
The Meme Games is a gamified meme token comprising popular crypto meme coin characters who reward presale buyers with bonuses for winning events.
02 Where do I enter the games?
Buy $MGMES tokens using MetaMask or Best Walletin the widget at the top of this website to enter The Meme Games. Once you’ve purchased tokens, select your favorite meme athlete who’ll participate in events in a bid to win more tokens for you.
03 How do I win token bonuses?
Every time you buy $MGMES tokens, you’ll have another chance to select a meme athlete who might win more tokens! The chance is random each time, verified by blockchain tech.
04 Can I also stake my winnings?
Yes! All your winnings from buying tokens in presale and entering Meme Games events will be claimable and stakeable in our verified smart contracts, powered by Web3Paymentswhich is built on top of Web3Toolkittechnology.
05 Is there a support line?
There are additional FAQs in our Telegram channel if you need further information. Please also follow us on X/Twitter to experience the true spirit and excitement of The Meme Games!
Terms of ServiceCookie PolicyPrivacy Policy

Disclaimer: The Meme Games Token is a speculative meme coin asset that carries mainly social value. Any cryptocurrency investment is risky. Always do your own research. Nothing on this website is financial advice. Play along in the spirit of the Olympics!
